title: VIEWING permission for Main Dashboards for external users
excerpt: Currently if you create a main dashboard (high level dashboard that is NOT within a board), you can only share with a team member or guest. When you share with the guest, you also have to add that guest on ALL the sharab…

posts.author: loul (Lou Liebau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently if you create a main dashboard (high level dashboard that is NOT within a board), you can only share with a team member or guest. When you share with the guest, you also have to add that guest on ALL the sharable boards applicable to that dashboard. This hasn’t worked for me and it baffles me why we cannot have a simple sharable dashboard with viewer permission that I can pull in data from multiple boards?

I’d like to use dashboards for our vendors to show data when we have deadlines coming up, but it’s not allowing me to do this and it’s forcing all my vendors to sign up as a guest and view unnecessary items within the main boards as well.

Please vote for this change!
